{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/211-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Table of Contents"
tags:
  * anthropic
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents_
2. _What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent_
3. _Empirical Case Study: «Обучай»_
4. _Architecture of Professional Colleague Agents_
5. _The Economics of Profession-Wide Replication_
6. _Risks Specific to this Category_
7. _Application Domains_
8. _Pilot Proposal: SGB Advocate Colleague_
9. _Relationship to Other Agent Types_
10. _Open Questions_
11. _Call for Collaboration_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[253-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.26)
* [[169-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.23)
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-]] (сходство 0.18)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[253-table-of-contents]]
* [[169-table-of-contents]]
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-]]
* [[308-table-of-contents]]


h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[213-2-what-makes-a-professional-colleague-agent|2. What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent]] _42%_
* [[212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents|1. The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents]] _37%_
* [[220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types|9. Relationship to Other Agent Types]] _37%_
* [[226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types|Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types]] _33%_
* [[253-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _33%_
* [[169-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _29%_
* [[172-3-what-makes-a-representative-agent|3. What Makes a Representative Agent]] _29%_
* [[214-3-empirical-case-study-обучай|3. Empirical Case Study: «Обучай»]] _29%_
